name: Shadows of Truth VR
short_description: As a detective you need to find clues and plotted them in your mind and got close to the answers, but things took different turn someone is chasing you in your nightmares and it keeps coming! Back in reality someone else is also trying to reach to John. You need to escape and get to the answers!
detailed_description:
Shadows of truth is a detective horror game where in each episode you are collecting clues, solving the relation of the clues and getting closer to the truth.

In this episode you are searching for the disappearance of John who has vanished and left behind scattered clues. You found the clues and plotted them in your mind and got close to the answers, but things took different turn someone is chasing you in your nightmares and it keeps coming! Back in reality someone else is also trying to reach to John. You need to escape and get to the answers!

Key Game Features:

Photorealistic graphics

Immersive VR experience

Solving clues on a mind board

Hiding from enemies
